title: ExNihilo-Draconic-Extend
description: A Draconic Evolution extended mod and datapack for Ex Nihilo: Sequentia
body:
# ExNihilo-Draconic-Extend
This data pack/mod adds some new recipes that make it possible to obtain Draconic Evolution items Ex Nihilo: Sequentia.
### Depends
[Ex Nihilo: Sequentia](https://modrinth.com/mod/exnihilosequentia), [Draconic Evolution](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/exnihilosequentia)
### Supported versions
Forge 1.16.5, Forge 1.18.2
## Sieve recipe
### Dust-->Draconium Dust
Iron : 1%

Diamond : 4%

Emerald  : 5%

Netherite : 8%
### Crushed Netherrack-->Draconium Dust
Iron : 4%

Diamond : 8%

Emerald : 10%

Netherite : 15%

### CrushedEnd Stone-->Draconium Dust
Iron : 15%

Diamond : 30%

Emerald : 35%

Netherite : 40%
## The difference between mod and datapack
Mod version may add more features,but the datapack version will not.

Loading and unloading of datapack version is more convenient.

**If it prompts that the version is incompatible when loading the datapack, you can ignore it.**
